module.name: Combat
module.description: Training in hand-to-hand combat, weapon proficiency, and tactical movement.

combat_close_quarters_combat.name: Close Quarters Combat
combat_close_quarters_combat.description: Training in hand-to-hand combat techniques for self-defense and high-risk encounters.

combat_combat_scenario_simulation.name: Combat Scenario Simulation
combat_combat_scenario_simulation.description: Realistic combat simulations for skill application and tactical decision-making.

combat_firearms_training.name: Firearms Training
combat_firearms_training.description: Weapons handling, marksmanship, and tactical shooting drills.

combat_melee_weapons_training.name: Melee Weapons Training
combat_melee_weapons_training.description: Mastery of melee combat weapons including knives, batons, and improvised tools.

combat_stealth_and_escape_tactics.name: Stealth and Escape Tactics
combat_stealth_and_escape_tactics.description: Training in stealth movement, evasion, and counter-capture techniques.

combat_tactical_movement.name: Tactical Movement
combat_tactical_movement.description: Training in battlefield positioning, cover usage, and movement under fire.

combat_close_quarters_combat_ground_figh.name: Ground Fighting
combat_close_quarters_combat_ground_figh.description: Mastering grappling, submissions, and escapes in ground combat scenarios.

cards.title: Mount Escape Techniques
cards.description: Methods for escaping from an opponent’s dominant mount position.
cards.bulletpoints: Bridge and roll, shrimp escape, frame and guard recovery
cards.summaryText: Escape oppressive mount control by chaining explosive bridges, shrimping to recover frames, and resetting guard before strikes or submissions land.

cards.title: Rear Naked Choke Execution
cards.description: Applying a high-percentage submission hold to neutralize opponents.
cards.bulletpoints: Grip placement, securing hooks, pressure application
cards.summaryText: Finish fights cleanly by locking hooks, setting airtight grips, and ramping controlled pressure until the rear naked choke forces a tap or sleep.

combat_close_quarters_combat_striking_an.name: Striking and Counterattacks
combat_close_quarters_combat_striking_an.description: Techniques for powerful strikes and effective counterattacks in close-quarters combat.

cards.title: Jab-Cross Combination
cards.description: Fundamental striking combination used to create openings and disrupt opponents.
cards.bulletpoints: Proper stance, speed, targeting vital points, follow-up strikes
cards.summaryText: Snap rapid jab-cross pairs that stay on-line, set up follow-up shots, and keep opponents reactive instead of dictating the exchange.

cards.title: Elbow and Knee Strikes
cards.description: Short-range powerful attacks used in clinch fighting.
cards.bulletpoints: Angle control, rapid execution, generating force from core
cards.summaryText: Own the clinch by carving sharp elbows, driving knees from the core, and managing angles so every close-range strike lands with fight-ending force.

combat_close_quarters_combat_weapon_disa.name: Weapon Disarm Tactics
combat_close_quarters_combat_weapon_disa.description: Techniques for disarming and neutralizing opponents wielding weapons.

cards.title: Knife Disarm Basics
cards.description: Essential movements for disarming an attacker with a bladed weapon.
cards.bulletpoints: Redirecting blade trajectory, control grips, counterattacks
cards.summaryText: Strip knives safely by redirecting the blade, locking dominant grips, and counterattacking before the assailant regains the weapon.

cards.title: Handgun Disarm Techniques
cards.description: Neutralizing a firearm threat within arm’s reach.
cards.bulletpoints: Redirecting barrel, rapid control, disabling opponent
cards.summaryText: Disarm handguns at close range by snapping the barrel offline, seizing control in one beat, and disabling the shooter before they recover.

combat_combat_scenario_simulation_high_s.name: High-Stress Drills
combat_combat_scenario_simulation_high_s.description: Training designed to improve decision-making and combat efficiency under extreme pressure.

cards.title: Blindfolded Reaction Drill
cards.description: Training to respond to sudden threats while deprived of vision.
cards.bulletpoints: Rely on auditory and tactile cues, execute immediate defensive action, maintain situational awareness
cards.summaryText: Sharpen blindfolded reactions by reading sound and touch, breaking the threat instantly, and anchoring situational awareness without sight.

cards.title: Disarm and Evade Under Fire
cards.description: Reacting to an armed opponent while engaging in controlled evasion.
cards.bulletpoints: Identify escape routes, control attacker’s firearm, neutralize immediate threat
cards.summaryText: Defeat gunpoint ambushes by seizing the weapon line, carving a safe exit path, and neutralizing the shooter while rounds fly.

combat_combat_scenario_simulation_live_f.name: Live Fire Simulations
combat_combat_scenario_simulation_live_f.description: Realistic combat drills using live ammunition to enhance combat readiness.

cards.title: Timed Cover and Engage
cards.description: Shooting drill designed to maximize accuracy and cover usage under time constraints.
cards.bulletpoints: Engage multiple targets, seek cover effectively, fire under pressure
cards.summaryText: Run precision live fire by weaving between cover, clearing targets against the clock, and keeping rounds on point under duress.

cards.title: Dynamic Room Clearing
cards.description: Engaging threats in close quarters while maintaining a low profile.
cards.bulletpoints: Control angles of approach, maintain sight alignment, avoid crossfire
cards.summaryText: Clear rooms dynamically by slicing angles, staying low-profile, and coordinating fire to eliminate threats without crossfire.

combat_combat_scenario_simulation_missio.name: Mission-Based Training
combat_combat_scenario_simulation_missio.description: Scenarios that simulate real-world combat engagements with strategic objectives.

cards.title: Hostage Rescue Simulation
cards.description: Executing a structured rescue operation in a hostile environment.
cards.bulletpoints: Assess threats, secure hostages, extract team safely
cards.summaryText: Orchestrate hostage rescues by triaging threats, locking down the site, and moving hostages and team out cleanly under fire.

cards.title: Night Operations Tactical Raid
cards.description: Executing a mission under low-visibility conditions with stealth tactics.
cards.bulletpoints: Use NVGs effectively, engage in silent takedowns, maintain minimal light exposure
cards.summaryText: Dominate night raids by leveraging NVGs, executing silent takedowns, and keeping light discipline tight to stay invisible.

combat_firearms_training_close_range_sho.name: Close Range Shooting
combat_firearms_training_close_range_sho.description: Drills for engaging threats in confined spaces with split-second reaction times.

cards.title: Reflexive Shooting Drill
cards.description: Fast engagement of targets using instinctive aiming techniques.
cards.bulletpoints: Index shooting mechanics, target tracking, movement integration
cards.summaryText: Deliver reflexive hits by indexing the pistol, tracking threats in motion, and firing before they touch the trigger.

cards.title: CQB Room Clearing
cards.description: Clearing confined spaces using efficient shooting and movement techniques.
cards.bulletpoints: Pie slicing tactics, target priority assessment, low-light adaptability
cards.summaryText: Clear tight rooms by slicing corners, sorting targets instantly, and adapting to low-light before the fight catches up.

combat_firearms_training_pistol_shooting.name: Pistol Shooting Drills
combat_firearms_training_pistol_shooting.description: Essential drills to improve accuracy, draw speed, and target transitions with a handgun.

cards.title: Draw and Fire Drill
cards.description: Developing quick draw and precision shooting under time constraints.
cards.bulletpoints: Grip stability, sight alignment, trigger control, rapid target acquisition
cards.summaryText: Win the draw by crushing grip, snapping sights on target, and pressing smooth shots before the timer buzzes.

cards.title: Failure-to-Stop Drill
cards.description: Engaging threats with precision shots to neutralize quickly.
cards.bulletpoints: Two shots to the torso, follow-up shot to the head, adjusting for target movement
cards.summaryText: Run failure-to-stop strings by double-tapping center mass, delivering a surgical head shot, and adjusting for target shifts mid-sequence.

combat_firearms_training_rifle_tactics.name: Rifle Tactics
combat_firearms_training_rifle_tactics.description: Training on handling and engaging targets effectively with rifles in combat environments.

cards.title: Controlled Pair Drill
cards.description: Firing two precise shots in succession to neutralize threats efficiently.
cards.bulletpoints: Rapid sight picture acquisition, trigger reset efficiency, recoil management
cards.summaryText: Hammer controlled pairs by reacquiring the sight picture instantly, rolling the trigger reset, and taming recoil so both rounds land.

cards.title: Cover and Fire Maneuver
cards.description: Using cover effectively while engaging hostile targets in tactical movement.
cards.bulletpoints: Shooting from cover, movement coordination, suppressive fire tactics
cards.summaryText: Dominate firefights by hugging cover, bounding with teammates, and layering suppressive fire to box in threats.

combat_melee_weapons_training_baton_defe.name: Baton Defensive Moves
combat_melee_weapons_training_baton_defe.description: Mastering the defensive and offensive applications of the baton in melee combat.

cards.title: Baton Blocking Techniques
cards.description: Using the baton to block and deflect incoming attacks.
cards.bulletpoints: Angle-based blocking, impact absorption, redirection tactics
cards.summaryText: Snap into a defensive guard, angle the baton to catch strikes, shed energy through your forearms, and roll into counter lanes while keeping range discipline.

cards.title: Joint Manipulation with Baton
cards.description: Using the baton for joint locks and control holds.
cards.bulletpoints: Targeting pressure points, leverage-based control, submission techniques
cards.summaryText: Bite onto elbows or wrists with the baton, pivot leverage through nearby joints, and funnel opponents into escorts or takedowns while compressing nerve clusters to break resistance.

combat_melee_weapons_training_knife_figh.name: Knife Fighting Tactics
combat_melee_weapons_training_knife_figh.description: Training in offensive and defensive knife combat techniques for close-quarters engagements.

cards.title: Grip and Stance
cards.description: Understanding the proper grip techniques and stances for effective knife combat.
cards.bulletpoints: Reverse grip vs. forward grip, defensive stance, mobility and footwork
cards.summaryText: Index the blade with either forward or reverse grip, lock your wrist, sink your weight, and glide through footwork triangles so you can launch or defend without telegraphing.

cards.title: Blade Deflections and Counters
cards.description: Techniques to deflect an incoming knife attack and counter with precision.
cards.bulletpoints: Parrying techniques, control and counter, quick response drills
cards.summaryText: Crash the attacking arm with pick, sweep, or wedge parries, seize control at the wrist, and feed precise counter cuts before the opponent can reset their line.

combat_melee_weapons_training_weapon_ret.name: Weapon Retention Drills
combat_melee_weapons_training_weapon_ret.description: Training in securing melee weapons during combat and preventing disarmament.

cards.title: Grip Strength and Weapon Control
cards.description: Developing grip endurance and hand control to prevent weapon loss.
cards.bulletpoints: Strength drills, grip adjustment techniques, counter-disarm maneuvers
cards.summaryText: Build crushing grip endurance, cycle choke, hammer, and saber grip adjustments, and snap into counters the second someone clamps your weapon hand.

cards.title: Retention in Close Quarters
cards.description: Defending against disarmament attempts in grappling range.
cards.bulletpoints: Body positioning, leverage advantage, reactive counters
cards.summaryText: Lock the weapon to your centerline, crash hips into the attacker, cycle leverage breaks, and chain reactive strikes to punish every disarm attempt in the clinch.

combat_stealth_and_escape_tactics_camouf.name: Camouflage and Blending
combat_stealth_and_escape_tactics_camouf.description: Methods for blending into different environments and avoiding detection.

cards.title: Natural Environment Camouflage
cards.description: Utilizing terrain and foliage to blend into outdoor environments.
cards.bulletpoints: Using shadows, breaking up silhouette, adjusting to lighting conditions
cards.summaryText: Ghost into natural terrain by breaking your outline with foliage, mirroring ambient colors, and riding shadow lanes so observers never get a clean read on your shape.

cards.title: Social Engineering Disguises
cards.description: Altering appearance and behavior to blend into social environments.
cards.bulletpoints: Changing gait, speech modulation, dressing for context
cards.summaryText: Slip into cover identities by matching wardrobe, cadence, and micro-behaviors, then ride crowd flow so even gatekeepers accept you as part of the background.

combat_stealth_and_escape_tactics_hostil.name: Hostile Escape Tactics
combat_stealth_and_escape_tactics_hostil.description: Training in escaping from hostile environments and avoiding capture.

cards.title: Urban Escape Route Planning
cards.description: Identifying multiple escape routes in urban environments before engaging in an operation.
cards.bulletpoints: Mapping safe zones, exploiting blind spots, blending with crowds
cards.summaryText: Pre-load secondary and tertiary exit paths, mark safe houses, and pattern crowd flows so you can vanish through blind spots the moment pressure hits.

cards.title: Restraint Evasion
cards.description: Techniques to escape from handcuffs, zip ties, and rope bindings.
cards.bulletpoints: Shim techniques, breaking zip ties, exploiting binding weaknesses
cards.summaryText: Drill covert shimming, friction burns, and leverage bursts so you can slip cuffs, pop ties, or unravel knots before captors realize their control collapsed.

combat_stealth_and_escape_tactics_silent.name: Silent Movement Training
combat_stealth_and_escape_tactics_silent.description: Techniques to minimize noise and remain undetected during movement.

cards.title: Soft Footfall Technique
cards.description: Methods for reducing footstep noise across different surfaces.
cards.bulletpoints: Heel-to-toe rolling, crouched movement, surface adaptation
cards.summaryText: Feather your steps by rolling heel-to-toe, compressing knees, and reading surface feedback so each stride melts into ambient noise.

cards.title: Breath Control for Stealth
cards.description: Using controlled breathing to maintain calmness and reduce sound production.
cards.bulletpoints: Slow diaphragmatic breathing, controlled exhalation, masking breath with environmental noise
cards.summaryText: Sync low diaphragmatic breaths with ambient noise cycles, exhale through micro-openings, and keep your nervous system quiet so nothing betrays your position.

combat_tactical_movement_cover_usage_tac.name: Cover Usage Tactics
combat_tactical_movement_cover_usage_tac.description: Maximizing survival by effectively using cover in combat scenarios.

cards.title: Hard vs. Soft Cover
cards.description: Identifying effective cover options in different combat scenarios.
cards.bulletpoints: Recognize bullet-resistant vs. bullet-penetrable surfaces, use depth perception, avoid exposing limbs
cards.summaryText: Scan the battlespace for hard cover, test angles before posting up, and keep elbows tucked so nothing extends past the barrier you trust to stop rounds.

cards.title: Dynamic Cover Transitioning
cards.description: Moving between cover positions while minimizing exposure.
cards.bulletpoints: Use short, controlled sprints, time movement with distractions, stay unpredictable
cards.summaryText: Explode out of cover in burst sprints, hug the shortest lanes, and sync movement with suppression or ambient distractions so threats never catch you mid-transfer.

combat_tactical_movement_fire_and_maneuv.name: Fire and Maneuver
combat_tactical_movement_fire_and_maneuv.description: Coordinated movement and suppressive fire tactics for battlefield mobility.

cards.title: Bounding Overwatch
cards.description: Alternating cover fire while moving towards an objective.
cards.bulletpoints: Move in pairs, suppress enemy positions, use cover effectively
cards.summaryText: Cycle overwatch teams so one element pins targets while the other bounds forward, communicating every move to keep momentum without bleeding exposure.

cards.title: Flanking and Envelopment
cards.description: Executing a flanking maneuver to neutralize threats from an advantageous position.
cards.bulletpoints: Identify enemy weak points, coordinate flanking approach, maintain team communication
cards.summaryText: Map enemy arcs, fix them with frontal pressure, then sweep a flanking element through dead space to collapse their position from an unexpected angle.

combat_tactical_movement_urban_combat_mo.name: Urban Combat Movement
combat_tactical_movement_urban_combat_mo.description: Navigating and engaging in combat within urban environments.

cards.title: Corner Peeking and Pie Slicing
cards.description: Minimizing exposure while peeking around corners in urban combat.
cards.bulletpoints: Use slow, controlled movements, minimize silhouette exposure, employ angle advantage
cards.summaryText: Slice the pie on every corner, inching your muzzle and eye line through angles while keeping your body shielded behind walls and doorframes.

cards.title: Stairwell and Hallway Tactics
cards.description: Clearing stairwells and hallways while maintaining a tactical advantage.
cards.bulletpoints: Maintain fireteam spacing, control vertical movement, identify ambush points
cards.summaryText: Stack your team with tight sectors, lead with guns on threat lanes, and manage vertical slices so stairwells and hallways never become fatal funnels.
